hero.title_highlight: that are used, not just looked at.
hero.description: Osamu Creative helps startups and companies design, build, and grow web apps, mobile apps, and internal systems that focus on user experience and real business needs.
hero.stat2_desc: a process that works closely with your internal team
hero.mobile_caption_prefix: From research and design to shipping, Osamu Creative

services.title: Osamu Creative Services
services.subtitle: We help you from idea to shipped product — through thoughtful design, solid engineering, and a transparent collaboration process.
services.webapps_desc: We build scalable, maintainable web apps and internal dashboards — from admin panels to SaaS platforms.
services.mobile_desc: We design and develop mobile apps with smooth, consistent user experiences across devices.
services.ux_desc: We help your team understand user needs, map flows, and craft high-fidelity designs ready for development.

process.title: Clear Collaboration Process
process.subtitle: We believe a healthy project starts with clear expectations. This is the process we use for almost all Osamu Creative engagements.
process.note: Flexible for waterfall, agile sprint, or hybrid workflows.
process.phase1_desc: Requirement workshops, user journey mapping, feature prioritization, and defining a realistic project scope.
process.phase2_desc: Wireframes, UI design, and clickable prototypes for validating product direction before development.
process.phase3_desc: Frontend & backend implementation, API integrations, automated tests, and manual QA in staging.
process.phase4_desc: Structured go-live, early metrics observation, and iteration based on user and internal team feedback.

portfolio.title: Featured Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: A snapshot of projects we’ve worked on — from internal dashboards to consumer-facing applications.
portfolio.p1_desc: A real-time dashboard to monitor sales, stock levels, and sales team performance across multiple cities.
portfolio.p1_tech: Tech stack: Nuxt, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS
portfolio.p2_desc: A membership app with points, vouchers, and push notifications to increase customer repeat purchases.
portfolio.p2_tech: Tech stack: Flutter, Firebase, REST API
portfolio.p3_desc: End-to-end redesign for a B2B SaaS platform, focusing on simplifying complex flows and improving adoption.
portfolio.p3_meta: Deliverables: UX audit, design system, prototype
portfolio.cta_text: Want to see more detailed case studies?
portfolio.cta_highlight: We can share a portfolio tailored to your industry.
portfolio.cta_hint: Include your business type and project needs in the consultation form.

expertise.title: Tech Stack & Expertise
expertise.subtitle: We combine solid engineering with thoughtful design — so your product not only works, but feels great to use.

about.title: Osamu Creative: Less, but Better.
about.paragraph1: Osamu Creative is a software house and digital product studio focused on clean execution, clear design, and communication that is easy to follow for every stakeholder.
about.paragraph2: We like to work closely with your internal team — founders, product, and ops — to ensure what we build truly solves business problems, not just adds more features.
about.how_we_work_item3: Documentation that can be handed over to your internal team
about.suited_for_item1: Startups that need a product execution team
about.suited_for_item3: Small teams that need to accelerate delivery
about.suited_for_item4: Brands that want stronger digital experiences

testimonials.title: What our clients say about Osamu Creative
testimonials.subtitle: A few highlighted feedback from teams we've collaborated with.
testimonials.t1_quote: Osamu Creative didn’t just complete tasks—they helped us think through product priorities. Communication was smooth, documentation was clean, and the handover to our internal team was seamless.
testimonials.t2_quote: From the design side, Osamu Creative is strong in detail and consistency. On the delivery side, they were flexible and adapted well to our sprint rhythm.

contact.title: Ready to discuss your digital product?
contact.subtitle: Share a brief context of your business and project idea. We'll respond with recommendations and an initial estimate.
contact.name: Name
contact.message_placeholder: Example: dashboard redesign, mobile app build, internal system integration, etc.
contact.response_note: We typically respond within 1–2 business days with several approach options and a rough estimate. For deeper discussion, we can schedule a short intro call first.

footer.brand_desc: Osamu Creative is a software house & digital product studio focused on functional products, clean design, and transparent communication.
footer.tagline: Software House & Digital Product Studio – Less, but Better.
